caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green t-shirt with bold text and a cap, along with headphones. The setting appears to be a studio within a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly discussing topics related to business or entrepreneurship, given the context of the show's title. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional discussion aimed at sharing insights or advice.
